findings.finding_text: Gate emits repeated missing-source findings when one bad source id appears in many website fields. Acceptable because every finding includes the exact field path, and release output is capped at 60 lines.
Implementation keeps route date distinct from analytic asOf, preserving the established publication-state snapshot semantics.
Gate is read-only and local-only. It does not sync, regenerate, push, publish, or promote any website surface.
